title: Index of implementation-slice evidence (navigation aid)
note: ADVISORY navigation index for an agentic reader. The NORMATIVE ledger lives in ../CONTRACTS/accepted-slices.json; do not treat this index as authority.

contents.review_rounds: round1..round13 — per round: review-{claude,agy,codex,grok,gemini}.json + roundN-review-summary.json (final round also mirrored as review-*.json)
contents.slice_gate: gate.mjs (the slice's deterministic gate) + gate-result.json (finalStatus meets, converged)
contents.runner: run-slice-4a-review.mjs (signed council review harness; does NOT merge)

contents.acceptance: harvested implementation accepted through PR #126 and The Eye's merge decision
query surface, driver, and first real-repository weave accepted through PR #126
flagship and escalation-path proof accepted through PR #126
Phase 1 closure and reproduction evidence accepted through PR #126

earlier_precedent: Slice 1 (Task 1 scaffold) was accepted via PR #110 ('The Eye accepts Clotho Phase 1 Slice 1'); its review evidence predates the per-slice run-directory convention
current_state: Clotho Phase 1 complete: slices 4a, 4b, 5, 6, and 7 accepted; no next or pending slice. Historical per-task query files remain as evidence.
